subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim unto that Spot round which circle the holy ones! Praise be unto God that thou didst travel vast distances and traverse mountain
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر مطاف ربانیان الحمد لله که طی مسافات بعیده نمودی و کوه و صحرا و دریا
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @Shrines and Holy places, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
